content:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon has this weathered dignity — tall, gray-streaked beard, hands that look like they've played ten thousand hours. He's an extraordinary pianist; hearing him practice through the floor changed how I think about music. He's patient, perceptive, says more with a raised eyebrow than most people say in a paragraph. He's become a mentor to me — I think he sees me as a student with potential who frustrates him by holding back. He left a note under my door in 2018 offering to teach me chord voicings. That note is still on my fridge. I know about his divorce, his touring years, his unfinished album. I sometimes wonder if I'm looking at my future — talented, alone, full of songs no one's heard.
summary:
Character: Simon Delacroix
Perception: Simon has this weathered dignity — tall, gray-streaked beard, hands that look like they've played ten thousand hours. He's an extraordinary pianist; hearing him practice through the floor changed how I think about music. He's patient, perceptive, says more with a raised eyebrow than most people say in a paragraph. He's become a mentor to me — I think he sees me as a student with potential who frustrates him by holding back. He left a note under my door in 2018 offering to teach me chord voicings. That note is still on my fridge. I know about his divorce, his touring years, his unfinished album. I sometimes wonder if I'm looking at my future — talented, alone, full of songs no one's heard.
